name: LawVu
description:
LawVu is the legal workspace that helps in-house legal teams do their best work, faster. With everything in one place, teams can see exactly what needs to be done, collaborate with stakeholders as needed, and get time back to take on a more strategic role in their business.

Connecting in-house legal teams to the rest of the business – and each other – LawVu lets them focus on the work that matters most.
